biological_replicate: Healthy individuals (n = 2, male, 28 to 52 years old) and proteinuria patients (n = 3, 2 males and 1 female, 24 to 71 years old)
technical_replicate: Three technical replicates of the MS sample preparation procedure and LC-MS/MS analysis were conducted
experimental_design: healthy individuals vs proteinuria patients comparison
